spec.name: The Hole
spec.description: You find yourself standing in a small alcove as the tunnel comes to a somewhat sudden end. Looking about you suddenly notice a rather big hole in the floor of the tunnel. In fact, it seems that another step forward and you would have fallen into it. The tunnel itself leads to the west, and looking down into the hole in the floor reveals little beyond the fact that it seems to be very deep and very dark. There is a very strange smell emanating from the hole, it almost smells like something down there is rotting.

extra_descs.description: Before you head down, you drop a rock to see how deep the hole is... After about five minutes, it still hasn't hit bottom. Thus, for reasons of sanity, you decide not to go this way.
